title: OpenAI ships new enterprise AI agent toolkit
summary: OpenAI announced an updated toolkit for enterprise AI agent orchestration and guardrails.

title: NVIDIA reveals next-generation GPU roadmap for AI training
summary: The roadmap focuses on higher memory bandwidth and lower power consumption for large model training.

title: 某云厂商发布新一代云原生 DevOps 平台
summary: 该平台整合 CI/CD、可观测性与安全扫描，提升企业软件交付效率。

title: Popular open source SaaS framework reaches v3
summary: The release adds multi-tenant primitives and improved deployment tooling.

title: 开源 AI 编程助手本周更新
summary: 更新包含代码补全性能优化与上下文窗口提升。
